visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing a grey flat cap and round glasses, is centered in the frame. He is dressed in a light green t-shirt. He stands in an indoor studio with a light blue textured wall as the background. He begins speaking with animated facial expressions and hand gestures. A white ChatGPT logo is overlaid in front of his chest. (2) The man continues his presentation, moving his hands to emphasize his points. The camera remains static at a medium shot, capturing him from the chest up. Yellow star emojis briefly twinkle around his face. (3) The scene transitions slightly as he continues talking, his hands moving outward. Large text overlays and logos appear around him. The lighting is bright and even studio light, casting soft shadows. (4) He continues to explain, gesturing with both hands. Various app logos like Spotify and Booking.com appear as floating overlays. He looks directly at the camera with an engaging, smiling expression. (5) The background remains the same studio setting. He uses his hands to simulate the action of using an app. A music equalizer graphic pulses briefly. (6) He shifts his body slightly while talking about travel. A blue airplane icon and the Booking.com logo are displayed beside him. (7) He continues the explanation, gesturing towards a green download arrow icon that appears on screen. His expressions remain energetic and informative. (8) A large montage of multiple app logos (Coursera, Canva, Figma, etc.) appears above his head, filling the top half of the frame. He smiles broadly and concludes his talk with a final gesture.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣tim哥, 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 不再是聊天機器人. [Variety]: (stars). (2) [Subtitle]: 生活的助手. (3) [Subtitle]: OpenAI 宣布推出. [Slogan]: ChatGPT應用功能. (4) [Logo]: Spotify, Booking.com. [Subtitle]: 整合了Spotify, Booking.com... (5) [Subtitle]: 這些熱門的APP, 讓你對話中. (6) [Subtitle]: 可以通過ChatGPT 執行APP操作. (7) [Subtitle]: 例如叫ChatGPT 幫你建立專屬歌單. (8) [Logo]: Spotify. [Subtitle]: 那ChatGPT呢, 就會直接開啟. (9) [Subtitle]: 自動生成播放清單. (10) [Subtitle]: 除此之外ChatGPT, 也會依照你聊天的內容. (11) [Subtitle]: 推薦適合的APP. (12) [Subtitle]: 例如你詢問它說, 出國訂房相關話題時候. (13) [Logo]: Booking.com. [Subtitle]: 它就會開啟 Booking.com. (14) [Subtitle]: 瀏覽訂房網. (15) [Subtitle]: 那目前這功能已經對. (16) [Subtitle]: 歐盟以外的登入者. (17) [Subtitle]: 可以開放使用了. (18) [Logo]: Coursera, Canva, Figma, Expedia, Spotify, Booking.com. [Subtitle]: 首波合作APP 除了畫面上這些以外. (19) [Subtitle]: 未來也會持續擴充合作APP 期待吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator presenting in front of a studio wall.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged Asian man wearing a grey flat cap, round-framed glasses, and a light green t-shirt with a 'ROOTS' logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple studio setup with a light blue, slightly textured wall. There's a hint of a wooden shelf and a small plant on the right side in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately. A clear, enthusiastic male voice begins speaking in Mandarin. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as he introduces OpenAI. The voice is fast-paced and well-enunciated. (3) A soft 'whoosh' sound accompanies the appearance of app logos. BGM continues with a steady beat. (4) A digital 'pop' sound effect occurs as he mentions Spotify integration. The speaker's tone is helpful and professional. (5) A bubbly, synthesized SFX plays when discussing automatic playlist generation. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (6) A transition 'whoosh' sound marks the shift to Booking.com features. The speaker's pitch variability is high, conveying excitement. (7) A clear 'ding' SFX signals the announcement of availability for non-EU users. The BGM tempo feels energetic. (8) A final digital UI sound effect plays as multiple logos are shown. The speaker ends with a rising, encouraging tone, and the BGM fades out slightly after the last word.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Information/Demonstration -> Summary -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To introduce and explain the new application integration features of ChatGPT (OpenAI), highlighting how it can now interact with third-party apps like Spotify and Booking.com to perform tasks directly for the user.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-density text overlays and synchronized sound effects typical of short-form social media content to maintain a high level of viewer engagement while delivering technical information.
